# 🏥 MeddyNet
## National Home Diagnostics Network
### Find, Compare & Book Diagnostic Tests from Trusted Labs Near You

<p align="center">
  <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/MeddyNet-National%20Home%20Diagnostics%20Network-00A86B?style=for-the-badge&logo=data:image/svg+xml;base64,&logoColor=white" alt="MeddyNet Badge" />
</p>

## 📚 Features
* **Search and Compare**: Find and compare diagnostic tests from trusted labs near you
* **Book Online**: Book your diagnostic tests online with ease
* **Transparent Pricing**: Get transparent prices for all diagnostic tests
* **NABL/ISO Certified Labs**: Our platform connects you with NABL/ISO certified pathology labs
* **User-Friendly Interface**: Our platform has a user-friendly interface for easy navigation

## 🚀 Tech Stack
* **HTML5**: Used for structuring and presenting content on the web
* **CSS3**: Used for styling and layout
* **JavaScript**: Used for adding interactivity to the platform
* **Responsive Design**: Our platform is mobile-friendly and responsive

## 📦 Installation
To get started with MeddyNet, follow these steps:
1. Clone the repository using `git clone https://github.com/your-username/MeddyNet.git`
2. Open the `index.html` file in a web browser to view the platform

## 📊 Usage
To use MeddyNet, follow these steps:
1. Search for diagnostic tests by location or test name
2. Compare prices and services from different labs
3. Book your diagnostic test online
4. Receive confirmation and instructions for your test

## 🗂️ Project Structure
* `MeddyNet.png`: Logo of MeddyNet
* `README.md`: This file
* `hero-illustration.png`: Hero illustration for the platform
* `index.html`: The main HTML file for the platform

## 🤝 Contributing
Contributions are welcome! If you have any suggestions or improvements, please submit a pull request or issue.
